studio.text:
Most people think making a movie costs $50k minimum.

NerdCommand Studio:
→ Write the script
→ AI renders the shots
→ Assembly runs automatically
→ Cinematic cut drops

We've shipped 3 full trailers. Zero crew. Zero studio budget.

nerdcommand.info/studio

#AIFilm #ContentCreator #NerdCommand

Exodus Horizon Legacy. Blood Relic. Hero's Open Source.

3 cinematic universes. All AI-produced. All from one command.

NerdCommand Studio is the autonomous production pipeline that doesn't need a crew — just a vision.

Early access open now 👇
nerdcommand.info/studio

#NerdCommand #AIStudio #IndieFilm

The AI film pipeline that actually ships:

1. Script parsed into shot bible
2. ComfyUI + Wan2.2 renders each scene
3. Color grade applied automatically (CINEMATIC / NOIR / FLASHBACK)
4. Audio synced + fades applied
5. Final cut assembled losslessly

You write. Studio delivers.

#AIProduction #FilmMaking #NerdCommand

What if you could color grade your entire film in one word?

NerdCommand Studio presets:
→ CINEMATIC — warm shadows, punchy highlights
→ NOIR — high contrast, desaturated
→ FLASHBACK — sepia warmth, crushed blacks
→ COOL — blue-tinted, modern
→ WARM — golden hour all day

One flag. Full grade. Every scene.

nerdcommand.info/studio

#ColorGrade #AIFilm #NerdCommand

Hero's Open Source — 5:06 feature film. Complete.

Sub-Saharan warriors. Future weapons. One AI production pipeline.

NerdCommand Studio built it from script to screen without a single human editor touching the timeline.

Early access open → nerdcommand.info/studio

#NerdCommand #BlackCinema #AfroFuturism #AIFilm

Stop waiting for budget to make your film.

NerdCommand Studio gives every creator access to:
→ Multi-model AI (Claude + ComfyUI + Wan2.2)
→ Autonomous scene assembly
→ Cinematic color grading
→ Social cuts auto-generated

The budget excuse is over.

deckbrief.text:

Conversion rate if you respond in 5 minutes: 100× higher.

DeckBrief closes that gap automatically. Every lead captured. Every follow-up drafted. Every morning briefed.

No dashboard. No notifications. Just clarity.

nerdcommand.text:

🤖 DeckBrief — captures leads, drafts follow-ups, sends your daily brief
🎬 Studio — writes scripts, renders shots, assembles your film

For business owners. For creators. Built by GangsterNerds LLC.

nerdcommand.info

#NerdCommand #AI #BlackOwnedBusiness #GangsterNerds

→ Lead capture that runs itself

Early access open now → nerdcommand.info
